Comparison table notes template

1. baseline_LCDM_bestfit
   - use the fair-comparison baseline best-fit under the same external likelihood set

2. legacy_fixed137_representative
   - use the representative fixed-137 / Run B point
   - clarify whether this is a chain sample or a local minimum

3. legacy_scan730_representative
   - use the high-H0 representative from scan_730_unlimit / scan_730_unlimit_v2

4. repaired_unified_narrow_posterior
   - fill with posterior mean / median / 16-84% values from repaired_unified_highH0_narrow

5. repaired_unified_narrow_bestpoint
   - fill with the minimum minuslogpost sampled point from repaired_unified_highH0_narrow

6. repaired_unified_narrow_rerun
   - fill only after the independent rerun finishes
   - the main criterion is reproducibility of the high-H0 basin:
     H0 ~ 72.8-73.0, log10V0 ~ -10, chi2_CMB ~ 2840-2850, tiny SHOES penalty
